arts.ttl: Moukoko fully expected to return to Dortmund
arts.sum: According to a reporter keeping a close eye on OGC Nice, there is no doubt that the French club will not be signing Borussia Dortmund loanee Youssoufa Moukoko permanently.

arts.ttl: Klopp regrets not signing Mané at Dortmund
arts.sum: Jürgen Klopp admitted that not signing Sadio Mané when he was Borussia Dortmund head coach was his biggest transfer regret.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Augsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and Augsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Kobel shares thoughts on football's latest rule change affecting goalkeepers
arts.sum: The BVB goalkeeper believes the new rule will both improve the game and speed it up.

arts.ttl: Report: Dortmund "ahead of the game" in pursuit of Jobe Bellingham
arts.sum: BVB are favourites to land the younger brother of Jude Bellingham despite a raft of other European clubs including RB Leipzig keen to acquire his services.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: Borussia Dortmund Falter with Home Advantage
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund’s midfield was completely overrun by Lille, especially in the second half, and Pascal Gross’s age showed itself through this match. Lille’s goal and a terrible second half, however, showed the limits of Dortmund’s current talent.
